# Shiru Extensions

Community-maintained extensions for Shiru.

<a href="https://github.com/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/stargazers"><img alt="GitHub stars" src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions?style=flat-square"></a>
<a href="https://github.com/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/blob/main/LICENSE"><img alt="License: GPLv3" src="https://img.shields.io/github/license/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions?style=flat-square"></a>
<a href="https://github.com/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/issues"><img alt="GitHub issues" src="https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions?style=flat-square"></a>

## Available Sources

- **anisearch** - SeaDex and Anime Tosho (Archive) extensions.
- **nyaasearch** - Nyaa and Sukebei extensions.
- **nekosearch** - nekoBT extension.

## Installation

### Add All Sources

1. Open Shiru and navigate to **Settings > Extensions > Sources**
2. Paste the following repository URL:
```
gh:Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions
```
3. Click **Add Source**

### Add Individual Sources

You can also add extension sources one at a time:

| Source     | Source URL                                 |
|------------|--------------------------------------------|
| anisearch  | `gh:Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/anisearch`  |
| nyaasearch | `gh:Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/nyaasearch` |
| nekosearch | `gh:Spithskia/Shiru-Extensions/nekosearch` |
